the state’s taxation 
division (e.g., DOR, OK TAX). 
If PRVDR_NUM_SYS equals “8” (Other), then this value is the name of the entity (e.g., SSA, DEA). 
If PRVDR_NUM_SYS equals “9” (Old state provider ID), then this variable is set to the applicable ANSI 
state numeric code. 
The provide type code (PRVDR_NUM_SYS) indicates the type of identifier that has been assigned.
